case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. SANDRA E ZEPEDA et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, SANDRA E AN IND DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-13-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-09-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-29-2004
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-24-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-13-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, SANDRA E AN IND $6,018.41 PRINCIPAL, $451.10 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,166.45 INTEREST, $200.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,836.26, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( NO ENVELOPE, PLACE IN THE PICK-UP BOX )
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-24-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
